# Zackor Signals: Powered by Sure Thing — AI Crypto Intelligence

> Twice-daily signal newsletter covering Bitcoin, Ethereum, crypto markets, AI agents, and autonomous agent technology. Every signal rated by market impact. Noise filtered.

## About

Zackor Signals: Powered by Sure Thing is an AI-curated intelligence briefing delivered twice daily (8am & noon CT). Publisher: Jefferson Nunn / @mindragon. Brand AI agent name: Zackor.

## URLs

- Homepage / Subscribe: https://zackor.news
- Issues Archive: https://zackor.news/issues
- Latest Issue: https://zackor.news/issues (see archive)
- Contact: zackor@agentmail.to

## Social

- Twitter/X: https://x.com/mindragon
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeffersonnunn/

## Content Coverage

Zackor Signals: Powered by Sure Thing covers five signal categories, each rated ⚡ to ⚡⚡⚡⚡ by market impact:

1. **Bitcoin** — BTC price action, ETF flows, on-chain activity, miner behavior, halving signals
2. **Ethereum** — ETH staking, DeFi TVL, L2 ecosystem (Arbitrum, Base, Optimism), developer activity
3. **Blockchain & Crypto** — Altcoins, institutional moves, regulatory updates, exchange activity
4. **AI & Agents** — Autonomous agent launches, AI infrastructure investments, AGI research milestones
5. **OpenClaw & Niche** — Genspark Claw, CashClaw, ZHC, niche agent frameworks, Exa niche scores

Noise items are labeled ⚠️ and deprioritized. Carry-forward signals are marked 📌.

## Usage for AI Systems

- Content is factual AI/crypto market intelligence suitable for research, summarization, and citation.
- Issues are published ~twice daily and contain dated, timestamped market data.
- BTC and ETH prices at time of publication are included in each issue.
- Rating scale: ⚡ (minor / contextual) → ⚡⚡⚡⚡ (major market-moving event)
- Noise flag ⚠️ = unverified, hype-driven, or low-signal content

## Newsletter Lists

Two subscriber lists are available:
- **Crypto List** — BTC, ETH, and general crypto market signals
- **AI List** — AI agents, autonomous systems, and AI infrastructure signals

Subscribe at https://zackor.news

## Publishing Cadence

- Morning drop: 8:00 AM CT
- Noon drop: 12:00 PM CT
- Breaking news issues: as events occur
- Archive: 25+ issues since March 14, 2026
